field.label: Enabled
field.help: Enable or disable this watcher mapping.

field.label: DHCP Source
field.help: Select the DHCP server to watch for leases.

field.label: Hostname Suffix
field.help: Primary zone used as the domain suffix for building FQDNs from DHCP hostnames (e.g., laptop becomes laptop.home.arpa). Leases are selected automatically from DHCP scopes advertising this domain.

field.label: TSIG Key
field.help: TSIG key used to authenticate nsupdate operations against BIND.
